package rulecoverage

func PositiveSyncMutexForReadonlyConfig() string {
    ruleID := "sync_mutex_for_readonly_config"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`mu.RLock(); v := config.X; mu.RUnlock()` for read-mostly config that changes rarely"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
